title: Citrusy Chewy Argentinian Masarepa Crumble
description: This Mediterranean-friendly dish features chewy white masarepa crumbled over a citrusy base and is perfect for a monsoon season in Argentina.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of white masarepa
ingredients.notes: Prepared using water and flour as per traditional methods

ingredients.name: 1 cup of fresh citrus zest (from limes, oranges, or grapefruits)
1/4 cup of coconut oil, melted
ingredients.notes: Helps bind ingredients together and adds a slight tropical touch

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well until a thick crumble forms.
Transfer the mixture onto an ungreased baking dish. Make sure to spread it evenly for uniform cooking.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Allow the masarepa crumble to cool before serving. It can be enjoyed as a dessert with fresh fruits or yogurt.
